sys_script_fix.description:
DEPRECATED NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - DEPRECATED
2.5.13
- Update the Active SubTasks field for previous tasks in the x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance table
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.5.13 - Set Count Active SubTask
